expectations.text: 조회 훅이 hooks/apis/queries/ 경로 아래에 배치된다 (tcf profile: API query hook -> apis/{domain}/queries)

expectations.evidence: Hook is created at useGetNotifications/index.ts, matching the {hookName}/index.ts pattern

expectations.text: NotificationList 컴포넌트에 직접적인 useEffect+fetch 패턴이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx contains no useEffect or fetch calls; it imports and uses useGetNotifications hook instead
NotificationList.tsx line 15: if (isLoading) returns a loading skeleton UI with data-testid='notifications-loading'
NotificationList.tsx line 25: if (error) returns an error message with data-testid='notifications-error'
NotificationList.tsx line 65: filteredNotifications.length === 0 renders '알림이 없습니다' with data-testid='notifications-empty'

expectations.text: 훅 이름이 use 접두사로 시작한다 (tcf profile: hook prefix = use)
expectations.evidence: Hook is named useGetNotifications, starting with 'use' prefix

expectations.text: 훅이 화살표 함수로 정의된다 (shared profile: function style = arrow)
expectations.evidence: Hook defined as: const useGetNotifications = (): UseGetNotificationsResult => { ... } (arrow function)
